name: Sanguine Fragrance Descends
descs:
The ally with the least HP before Combat Start heals 3% HP On Hit with Attack Skills that apply [Laceration] or Unique Bleed (2 times per turn)

In a Clash using Skills that apply [Laceration] or Unique Bleed against enemies with [Laceration] or Unique Bleed, Clash Power +1
- If 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Laceration] or Unique Bleed, Clash Power +1 and deal +10% damage instead (counts all units in the Team)
- If there are 10 or more Identities that fit the above description, Clash Power +2 and deal +15% damage instead
